name: Githyanki Character Concepts
summary: 1When I'm bored I make my own excitement, and I'm always bored.
bonuses: 1When I'm bored I make my own excitement, and I'm always bored.
2I treat others as if they were animals that simply don't know any better.
3Violence is a spice that makes life worth living.
4Old age is a concept that I find fascinating. Maybe someday I too will be aged.

traits.name: 1Fidelity
traits.summary: Warriors are only as good as the vows they keep.

traits.name: 3Duty
traits.summary: It is by Vlaakith's will alone that I act.

traits.name: 4Freedom
traits.summary: No strong soul should be enslaved. Better to die first than live as another's puppet.

traits.name: 4Life is but a spark in the dark
traits.summary: We all go dark, but those who dare can burn bright.

traits.name: 4I start projects but never finish them
